subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim, Friend of the All-Merciful! By the Will of God - exalted be His glory - Thou didst dawn from the horizon of manifestation, while the heedless denied [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم خلیل الرحمن باراده حق جل جلاله از افق ظهور اشراق نمود عباد غافل انکار
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
